reviews.review_msg: Honestly, many homeowk required and quizes are on everyweek

I loved this class. Michelle creates the course with student input. Her assignments are interesting. I learned about the practical side of teaching which allowed me to reflect on the profession as a whole. Great class, totally recommend it with her.
Her lectures were simple and straight to the point. She went through examples and gave time for people to try them during the lecture.

Gave straight forward lectures and many examples that reflected the midterm and finals. Is quite straight forward and blunt but is very easy to understand. Came to understand her and her humor by the end of the term.

Excellent Prof, Mahsa is funny and energetic, and she is very approachable for any questions regarding lecture criteria. She breaks down concepts to the point where they become easy to understand, and she gives helpful practice questions that are relative to exams. This is the first math class where I got an A!
Hard to understand but great lectures

The worst class I have had to take. Read his pro Bush book and only register if you can stomach it. Exposing yourself to different points of views is healthy but going to a lecture and ending up in Sunday school is really painful. His article on Christian Realism (assigned reading) would make the Tea Party blush.

Although his marking scheme is quite difficult, if you attend lecture and participate in tutorial you'll do fine. His teaching is mainly from his own experience which makes it that more interesting, and the fact that he's insanely sarcastic makes Friday lectures that much more bearable. Highly recommend class with him!
very easy course! gpa booster. exams are easy

Cliff is a tough grader but it is evident he really cares about his students. Make sure you pay attention and ask questions! He is very friendly one-on-one so don't be afraid to see him during his office hours.

Very bad notes he made for students. You cannot catch up with the lecture content without reading the text book throughly. He cannot give clear rules and answers for his questions on his slides. Not recommend this course if you want to have high GPA or don't have enough time for this course.
Exams are extremely hard. The TA I got was a hard marker. :(

This prof is the nicest person you'll ever meet but holy moly he's hard to learn from. It's an easy class but he makes the subject matter extremely boring, barely teaches the material and does polleverywhere polls 24/7 instead of showing slides.. I wish i could say i liked the class because i liked him a lot as a person and he definitely cares.

Dr. Bendell is a decent professor. She cares more about the overall picture rather than the memorization of facts like other biology courses. She can be a bit vague in her lectures and at times go too fast leaving students lost while she goes on. Exams are fair however some of the marking is interesting- looking for specific use of vocab and desc.
